---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Environment:**
- macOS version: [e.g. 14.5]
- Chip: [e.g. M1 Pro]
- RAM: [e.g. 16GB]
- Courtyard version: [e.g. 0.5.6]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.12.13]
- mlx-lm version: [e.g. 0.31.2]
- Model: [e.g. mlx-community/Qwen3.5-4B-OptiQ-4bit]
- Fine-tune type: [e.g. LoRA / DoRA / Full]
- Batch size: [e.g. 1]
- Max sequence length: [e.g. 1024]
- Display state during failure: [e.g. lid open / lid closed / external monitor connected]

**Logs / Error message**
Paste the full error message or the last 30-50 lines of logs here.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
